hooks.command: echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Main thread must not implement directly. Delegate all code edits to agents."}'

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); set -- $(printf '%s' "$cmd" | awk '{for(i=1;i<=NF;i++) if($i!~/^[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*=/) {printf "%s ", $i}}'); t1=$(basename "${1:-}"); t2="${2:-}"; if printf '%s' "$t1" | grep -qE '^(bash|sh|zsh|python3?)$'; then target="$t2"; else target=""; fi; if printf '%s' "$target" | grep -qE '(verify.sh|test_agent.py)$'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Development/debug commands must be delegated to agents."}'; elif printf '%s' "$target" | grep -qE 'run_pipeline.py$' && ! printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -q -- '--skip-qa'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"run_pipeline.py without --skip-qa is a dev/test run. Delegate to agents."}'; fi
